node.title: Not cleared Single System Design Interview !! Help needed !!

topic.title: Not cleared Single System Design Interview !! Help needed !!

post.content:
Hi Folks,  

I have participated in approximately 12 system design interviews but unfortunately, I have not been successful in clearing any of them. It has been depressing to receive no response or feedback after reaching out to the interviewers, as they have often chosen to ghost me. Some individuals have provided vague feedback, stating that there is room for improvement in design.  To prepare for these interviews, I have completed the following resources:  
1. I thoroughly studied the modern system design course on Educative.io.
2. I have gone through both Volume 1 and Volume 2 of Alex Xu's system design books. 
3. Additionally, I watched system design videos in youtube  channel (SDFC) and few from techdummies. 
4. Tried Self mock interviews by choosing system design question recently asked (From leetcode interview experience)   


what else I have to do? Please help me in this matter. Please share/pointout the documents which tradeOffs of all building blocks.

Practical experience is what you need I think - try implementing a few projects from scratch, have them in your GitHub profile and try to corelate it with the resources you\'ve mentioned above.\n\nIf not yet done, try noting down where you failed in previous interviews. This will help to improve and focus in specific area.
